scripts.build: pnpm build:api && pnpm build:web && pnpm build:worker
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @rmr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rmr/db build && pnpm --filter @rmr/api build
scripts.render:prepare: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.22.0 --activate && pnpm fetch --frozen-lockfile && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline
scripts.render:build:api: pnpm render:prepare && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @rmr/db exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm build:api
scripts.render:build:worker: pnpm render:prepare && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @rmr/db exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter @rmr/worker build
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm db:generate && pnpm build:api && pnpm build:worker && pnpm build:web
